summary: Derived 4 checklist items from brief scope.
Logged D1 (sage runtime+volume-cache) + D2 (flash baked + sage runtime) in decisions.md; user-confirmed.
MPI-64 green light received (msg c0be349b); build params locked v0.3.0, wrapper 0.2.2 unchanged; recorded in decisions.md.
Build #1 (run 27429271607) failed both legs; fixed 3 base-image gaps (git, ffmpeg, cu128 nightly-torch ABI -> stable 2.7.1+cu128 + torch2.7 wheel). mpi-ci a505634. Build #2 (27429999871) running.

Both tags v0.3.0-cu124 (CI) + v0.3.0-cu128 (local build, runner cant fit) LIVE + public on GHCR. cu128 image smoke-checked (torch 2.7.1+cu128, ffmpeg, no flash-attn). mpi-ci b5b82f6. Card -> validating; full validation = MPI-64 live-verify.
MPI-70 images shipped (both tags public); maturity validating.
Stays validating until MPI-64 confirms live v0.3.0 Pod ready (user gate). Live-verify in flight cu124/L4.
